fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item card from which you opened the Item Units of Measure window.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unit of measure code that has been set up in the Unit of Measure table.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many of the base unit of measure are contained in one unit of the item.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item unit of measure is coupled to a unit of measure in Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Width
fields.tooltip: Specifies the width of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Height
fields.tooltip: Specifies the height of one item unit when measured in the unit of measure in the Code field.

fields.name: Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume (cubage) of one item unit in the unit of measure in the Code field.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.
